characters.name: Hearts
characters.description: AllDisassembly Drones(implied): Hearts, also known ascores, are tech based-organic components present inside drones afflicted with theAbsolute Solverprogram, including certainWorker Dronesand allDisassembly Drones. Like the unaltered A.I. Cores inside all Worker Drones, Hearts still contain the drone’s core programming, but also store the Absolute Solver’s code. Hearts can have additional functions depending on which type of drone it resides in. Like all other components of drones that contain the Absolute Solver, Hearts are negatively affected by high temperatures and disintegrate in direct sunlight.
